name: IntuneManagement
description: A PowerShell application with WPF GUI for managing Microsoft Intune and Azure policies. Features export, import, copy, delete, document, and compare operations across 30+ object types with cross-tenant migration, ADMX import, bulk operations, and automated documentation.
author: Micke Karlsson

securityCheck.aiSummary: Overall assessment: The codebase implements standard Intune/Azure Graph management tooling with typical admin capabilities. It does not exhibit active obfuscated payloads, external code downloads, credential theft, or data exfiltration in the provided snippet. However, several risk vectors are present: in-memory handling of credentials, silent/hidden execution paths, recursive file unblocking, and dynamic loading from disk without explicit integrity checks. To improve security, enforce vault-backed credential retrieval, minimize or tightly constrain silent operation, sign modules, and add robust integrity checks and auditing for all dynamic loads and file operations.
